emotional_tone: Authority, Clarity, Truth - mixed with Approachability for Education

mono.usage: Overlines, labels, technical data, CRM card tags

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl clamp() fluid scaling

colors.contrast_rules: Tinted grey. Normal text min 4.5:1, Large 3:1. Focus states higher contrast.
colors.hover_rules: Always explicitly set text color on hover. Lighter hue of active state.

layout_spacing.grid_details: Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gap (gap-4 or gap-6). Widget Ratios: Summary col-span-1, Primary Data col-span-2 row-span-2.
layout_spacing.borders_and_padding: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision. Subgrid for inner items.

components.cards: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. border-collapse style layout, border-r border-b border-border/40. No shadow for dashboard cards unless hovered.
components.headers: Solid Background with hard bottom border. z-50 fixed. Never use transparent without blur.
components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges. Primary color sparingly.
components.kanban_crm: Swimlanes + Cards. Drag-and-drop. High contrast labels. Pastel tags for status.
components.charts: Recharts. Accessible charts (color-blind-friendly palettes). Grid lines transparent.
components.shadcn_overrides: Do NOT overuse generic Card. Go cardless, rectangular, dense styles. Tabs list h-auto.

motion.rules: Micro-interactions for feedback. Hover states, Click/press states, Focus states. Respect prefers-reduced-motion.

auth_background.description: Modern university building for auth page hero/background

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based).

instructions_to_main_agent: Include fontshare links in index.html for Cabinet Grotesk and Satoshi.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and Satoshi for body. Apply them in tailwind.config.js.
Implement the Control Room Grid for the Employer Dashboard widgets.
Design Kanban with drag and drop, clean flat cards, no heavy shadows.
For the Teacher QR Attendance, use a Mobile-First layout, clean scanning UI, high contrast.
Do not use generic Shadcn Cards everywhere. Use 'Grid Borders' (The Technical Look) for data lists and panels.
Ensure 'data-testid' is present on all buttons, forms, and key interaction points.
Follow 'Grid Borders (The Technical Look)' for dashboard widgets to increase density and scanability.
Only use primary blue (#002EB8) for CTAs and critical actions. Maintain high contrast.
